description: ATP Tennis Match Results by Surface & Player Ranking 1968-2023
skip_reason: GitHub repo JeffSackmann/tennis_atp returned 404 for all match files during download; data unavailable without manual browser download
proposed_title: ATP Tennis Win Rate by Surface Type and Player Ranking Category (2020)
binary_outcome: winner (each match row has winner_id and loser_id; encode as 1 for winner, 0 for loser, or use a player-match exploded view where outcome=1 if the player won)
encoding_note: Data files failed to download (404/429 errors from GitHub). Concept is viable: explode each match into two player-rows (winner=1, loser=0), group by surface x ranking_category to get Successes/Cases. Requires re-download from https://github.com/JeffSackmann/tennis_atp
